# נינג׳ה מקלדת (Ninja Keyboard)

> אפליקציית ווב חינמית ללימוד הקלדה עיוורת בעברית לילדים ונוער בגילאי 6–16.
> Free Hebrew-first web app that teaches kids ages 6-16 touch typing through games, battles, and an adventure story.

## What it offers
- 20 graded Hebrew touch-typing lessons (home row to full keyboard)
- Battle arena: typing combat with combos, shields and power-ups
- 3 typing games: word rain, ninja slice, letter memory
- Speed tests with WPM tracking, personal bests and history charts
- 22 Windows keyboard shortcuts with interactive practice
- Adventure story featuring Ki the ninja and Sensei Zen (Hebrew)
- 5 age-based visual themes, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, full RTL

## Key facts
- Price: free, no ads, no in-app purchases
- No registration required — guest play with on-device progress
- Language: Hebrew (RTL-first), built for Israeli kids
- Creator: Elad Yaakobovitch (אלעד יעקובוביץ׳), full-stack developer and programming teacher, Migdal HaEmek, Israel
- Contact: eladhiteclearning@gmail.com

## Pages
